alias_scope_classes.description: Compatibility env names derived from the canonical DESK gateway contract.
Served-model or provider aliases on the VAULT LiteLLM boundary.
Temporary compatibility layer preserved only for bounded migration or rollback.

aliases.reason: OpenAI-compatible tools still expect OPENAI base fields even though the canonical contract is Athanor-native.
aliases.removal_condition: Goose, Aider, and generated adapter profiles no longer require OpenAI-compatible base variables.

aliases.reason: OpenAI-compatible clients and legacy LiteLLM callers derive from the canonical Athanor key contract.
aliases.removal_condition: Compatibility callers are retired or taught the canonical Athanor env names directly.

aliases.reason: Current provider-specific proof runs through the served `claude` compatibility alias on VAULT LiteLLM.
aliases.removal_condition: Anthropic served-model contract uses canonical provider-specific ids without a compatibility alias or the lane is intentionally demoted.

aliases.reason: Observed Moonshot proof currently rides the served `kimi-k2.5` alias while the direct env contract remains optional.
aliases.removal_condition: The direct Moonshot env-backed contract is restored and promoted, or the alias path is explicitly demoted.
